---
title: "setup_R Action"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{setup_R Action}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Purpose

The `setup_R` action sets up the R environment for CI/CD workflows. It checks out the repository, configures the R version, installs dependencies, and optionally installs the package itself. It also installs development versions of upstream dependencies as defined in `staged_dependencies.yaml`.

# Inputs

- `r-version`: R version to use. The value is passed to the
[r-lib/setup-r](https://github.com/r-lib/actions/tree/v2/setup-r) action (see
its documentation for permitted values).

  *Default:* `'release'`.

- `http-user-agent`: HTTP user agent string.

  *Default:* `'default'`.

- `extra-packages`: Extra packages to install (in addition to the dependencies of the package and the `remotes` and `yaml` package). Comma separated list.

  *Default:* `''`.

- `install-package`: Should the package be installed?

  *Default:* `false`.

# Other Resources

The action expects the file [`staged_dependencies.yaml`](https://github.com/pharmaverse/admiralci/blob/main/staged_dependencies.yaml) to be present in the root of the repository. It defines upstream dependencies, e.g.:

```
upstream_repos:
- repo: pharmaverse/pharmaversesdtm
  host: https://github.com
- repo: pharmaverse/admiraldev
  host: https://github.com
```

# Jobs

## Main Job

Sets up the R environment and installs dependencies.

### Conditions

- The job always runs.
- The step "Install Development Versions of Dependencies" is skipped for commits with `[skip vbump]` in the message or for patch releases (`refs/heads/patch`).

### Steps

1. **Checkout repository**  
   Uses [`actions/checkout`](https://github.com/actions/checkout) to check out the repository.

2. **Set up R**  
   Uses [`r-lib/setup-r`](https://github.com/r-lib/actions/tree/v2/setup-r) to set up the R environment with the specified R version and HTTP user agent.

3. **Install dependencies**  
   Uses [`r-lib/setup-r-dependencies`](https://github.com/r-lib/actions/tree/v2/setup-r-dependencies) to install package dependencies and any extra packages.

4. **Install Development Versions of Upstream Dependencies**  
   Installs development versions of upstream dependencies defined in `staged_dependencies.yaml`, except for releases and patch releases.

5. **Install package**  
   If `install-package` is `true`, installs the package using `pak::pkg_install(".")`.

# Source

See [`setup_R/action.yaml`](https://github.com/pharmaverse/admiralci/blob/main/.github/actions/setup_R/action.yaml) for the action definition.
